title: L2 budget.reconcile Payload
description: Reconciliation cron event emitted every reconciliation.interval_hours (default 6h). Compares internal counter to billing API for current UTC day; emits BLOCKER on drift > threshold. Counter NOT auto-corrected — operator must run force-reconcile. cycle-098 Sprint 2A/2B.

counter_usd.description: Internal counter sum for current UTC day.

billing_usd.description: Billing API reported usage for current UTC day. null if billing API unreachable.

drift_pct.description: abs(counter - billing) / max(billing, counter) * 100. null if billing_usd is null.

blocker.description: True iff drift_pct > drift_threshold_pct OR billing API unreachable + counter near cap.

billing_api_unreachable.description: True iff billing API client failed (timeout, error, missing); reconcile defers without auto-correction.

force_reconcile.description: True iff this entry was emitted by an operator force-reconcile invocation.

operator_reason.description: Operator-supplied reason for force-reconcile (required for force-reconcile=true).
